name: kore-chamber
description: Auto-crystallize Claude conversations into Obsidian notes
author: itoz

scripts.build: node -e "require('fs').rmSync('dist',{recursive:true,force:true})" && tsc && node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const src='src/templates'; const dest='dist/templates'; fs.mkdirSync(dest,{recursive:true}); for (const file of fs.readdirSync(src)) fs.copyFileSync(src + '/' + file, dest + '/' + file);"
